requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Parameter Testing to ITU / ANSA-Referenced Standards (ATRA Type Approval Requirement)
requirement_topic.zh: ITU/ANSA参考标准的EMC及无线电参数测试（ATRA型号认证要求）
requirement_topic.zht: ITU/ANSA參考標準的EMC及無線電參數測試（ATRA型號認證要求）

summary.en: ATRA type approval requires EMC and radio parameter test reports from a recognised laboratory demonstrating conformance with ITU-R recommendations or internationally accepted EMC standards applicable to the device category. The Afghanistan National Standards Authority (ANSA) is the national standards body and provides technical standards references in support of ATRA regulatory function. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, ITU-T and ETSI EN 301 489 series standards are internationally recognised frameworks commonly referenced in ATRA dossiers. For other radio categories (LoRa/SRD, cellular), applicable ITU-R or ETSI sub-standards apply. EMC test evidence is submitted as part of the ATRA type approval application. Chinese GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625) are not independently accepted by ATRA.
summary.zh: ATRA型号认证要求提供由经认可实验室出具的EMC及无线电参数测试报告，证明符合适用于该设备类别的ITU-R建议或国际公认EMC标准。阿富汗国家标准局（ANSA）为国家标准机构，为ATRA的监管职能提供技术标准参考。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，ITU-T及ETSI EN 301 489系列标准是ATRA申请文件中常见的国际公认参考框架。其他无线类别（LoRa/SRD、蜂窝）适用相应的ITU-R或ETSI子标准。EMC测试证据作为ATRA型号认证申请文件的一部分提交。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被ATRA单独接受。
summary.zht: ATRA型號認證要求提供由經認可實驗室出具的EMC及無線電參數測試報告，證明符合適用於該設備類別的ITU-R建議或國際公認EMC標準。阿富汗國家標準局（ANSA）為國家標準機構，為ATRA的監管職能提供技術標準參考。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，ITU-T及ETSI EN 301 489系列標準是ATRA申請文件中常見的國際公認參考框架。其他無線類別（LoRa/SRD、蜂窩）適用相應的ITU-R或ETSI子標準。EMC測試證據作為ATRA型號認證申請文件的一部分提交。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被ATRA單獨接受。

standards_or_laws: ANSA — Afghanistan National Standards Authority technical standards references
ITU-R Radio Regulations and ITU-R Recommendations (radio parameters)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 (EMC for wideband data / WLAN / Bluetooth)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and radio equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions for ISM/IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). SRRC type approval includes radio parameter measurements but does not encompass the full ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC test scope. CCC certification includes EMC under GB/T 9254 for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及无线电设备的EMC合规依据GB/T 9254（ISM/IT设备的传导和辐射发射）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）执行。SRRC型号认证包含无线电参数测量，但不涵盖完整的ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC测试范围。CCC认证对列入目录的产品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及無線電設備的EMC合規依據GB/T 9254（ISM/IT設備的傳導和輻射發射）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）執行。SRRC型號認證包含無線電參數測量，但不涵蓋完整的ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC測試範圍。CCC認證對列入目錄的產品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (radio parameter testing, not full EMC)

gap.en: ATRA requires EMC evidence to ITU-R or ETSI EN 301 489 series standards, which differ in test methods, limits, and frequency ranges from Chinese GB/T 9254. A new EMC test campaign at an ATRA-accepted accredited laboratory is required. Existing SRRC and CCC EMC reports to GB standards cannot be reused for ATRA. The ETSI EN 301 489 framework also covers immunity testing (IEC 61000-4 series) beyond the SRRC radio parameter scope. Due to Afghanistan limited domestic accredited laboratory infrastructure, testing is typically conducted at a third-country accredited laboratory whose reports are accepted by ATRA.
gap.zh: ATRA要求提供符合ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列标准的EMC证据，该系列在测试方法、限值和频率范围上均与中国GB/T 9254有所不同。须在ATRA认可的经认可实验室进行新的EMC测试。现有的依据GB标准出具的SRRC和CCC EMC报告不能用于ATRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架还涵盖超出SRRC无线电参数范围的抗扰度测试（IEC 61000-4系列）。由于阿富汗国内认可实验室基础设施有限，测试通常在经认可的第三国实验室进行，其报告由ATRA接受。
gap.zht: ATRA要求提供符合ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列標準的EMC證據，該系列在測試方法、限值和頻率範圍上均與中國GB/T 9254有所不同。須在ATRA認可的經認可實驗室進行新的EMC測試。現有的依據GB標準出具的SRRC和CCC EMC報告不能用於ATRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架還涵蓋超出SRRC無線電參數範圍的抗擾度測試（IEC 61000-4系列）。由於阿富汗國內認可實驗室基礎設施有限，測試通常在經認可的第三國實驗室進行，其報告由ATRA接受。

source.publisher: ATRA — Afghanistan Telecom Regulatory Authority; ANSA — Afghanistan National Standards Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC and radio parameter testing to ITU-R or ETSI EN 301 489 series at an ATRA-accepted accredited laboratory is required as part of ATRA type approval. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC EMC test reports are not independently accepted by ATRA. Testing is typically performed at an accredited third-country laboratory due to limited Afghan domestic testing infrastructure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在ATRA认可的经认可实验室按ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列进行EMC及无线电参数测试，是ATRA型号认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC测试报告不被ATRA单独接受。由于阿富汗国内测试基础设施有限，测试通常在经认可的第三国实验室进行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在ATRA認可的經認可實驗室按ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列進行EMC及無線電參數測試，是ATRA型號認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC測試報告不被ATRA單獨接受。由於阿富汗國內測試基礎設施有限，測試通常在經認可的第三國實驗室進行。

requirement_topic.en: Dari and Pashto Labelling and Documentation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 达里语及普什图语标签与文件要求
requirement_topic.zht: 達里語及普什圖語標籤與文件要求

summary.en: Product labelling and user documentation in Dari and/or Pashto — Afghanistan two official languages — is preferred and may be required for consumer wireless devices sold in Afghanistan. Labels must include the ATRA approval number, model designation, power specifications (voltage and frequency: 220 V / 50 Hz), manufacturer name and country of origin, and authorized Afghan importer or agent contact information. Packaging and user manuals in Chinese-only or English-only are generally insufficient for consumer retail distribution in Afghanistan.
summary.zh: 达里语和/或普什图语——阿富汗两种官方语言——的产品标签及用户文件在阿富汗销售的消费类无线设备中为首选，且可能为要求。标签须包含ATRA认证编号、型号名称、电源规格（电压和频率：220V/50Hz）、制造商名称及原产国，以及阿富汗授权进口商或代理联系信息。仅中文或仅英文的包装及用户手册通常不足以在阿富汗消费零售渠道分销。
summary.zht: 達里語和/或普什圖語——阿富汗兩種官方語言——的產品標籤及用戶文件在阿富汗銷售的消費類無線設備中為首選，且可能為要求。標籤須包含ATRA認證編號、型號名稱、電源規格（電壓和頻率：220V/50Hz）、製造商名稱及原產國，以及阿富汗授權進口商或代理聯繫信息。僅中文或僅英文的包裝及用戶手冊通常不足以在阿富汗消費零售通路分銷。

standards_or_laws: Afghanistan Constitution 2004, Article 16 (Dari and Pashto as official languages)
ATRA Type Approval labelling requirements (ATRA approval number on label)
Applicable Afghan consumer protection and import regulations

summary.en: In China, product labels must include Chinese-language descriptions of product name, model, power ratings, manufacturer name, country of origin, and CCC mark (where applicable). Mandatory Chinese labelling is enforced by SAMR under the Law on the Protection of Consumer Rights and Interests.
summary.zh: 在中国，产品标签须以中文标注产品名称、型号、额定功率、制造商名称、原产国及CCC标志（如适用）。国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）依据《消费者权益保护法》执行强制性中文标签要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，產品標籤須以中文標注產品名稱、型號、額定功率、製造商名稱、原產國及CCC標誌（如適用）。國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）依據《消費者權益保護法》執行強制性中文標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: China Law on the Protection of Consumer Rights and Interests

gap.en: Chinese-language-only labels do not satisfy Afghanistan requirements. New Dari and/or Pashto labels must be produced for the Afghanistan market, incorporating the ATRA approval number and Afghan authorized importer contact details. English-only or Chinese-only user manuals are insufficient for consumer retail distribution in Afghanistan. Labels should ideally include both Dari and Pashto where feasible.
gap.zh: 仅中文标签不满足阿富汗要求。须为阿富汗市场制作新的达里语和/或普什图语标签，并注明ATRA认证编号及阿富汗授权进口商联系方式。仅英语或仅中文的用户手册不足以在阿富汗消费零售渠道分销。标签应尽量同时包含达里语和普什图语。
gap.zht: 僅中文標籤不滿足阿富汗要求。須為阿富汗市場製作新的達里語和/或普什圖語標籤，並標注ATRA認證編號及阿富汗授權進口商聯繫信息。僅英語或僅中文的用戶手冊不足以在阿富汗消費零售通路分銷。標籤應盡量同時包含達里語和普什圖語。

source.publisher: ATRA — Afghanistan Telecom Regulatory Authority; Afghanistan Constitution 2004

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Dari and/or Pashto labelling and user documentation are required for consumer wireless devices sold in Afghanistan. The ATRA approval number and Afghan authorized importer details must appear on the label. Chinese-only or English-only labels and manuals are insufficient for Afghanistan consumer retail distribution.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿富汗销售的消费类无线设备须提供达里语和/或普什图语标签及用户文件。标签须标注ATRA认证编号及阿富汗授权进口商信息。仅中文或仅英文标签及手册不足以在阿富汗消费零售渠道分销。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿富汗銷售的消費類無線裝置須提供達里語和/或普什圖語標籤及用戶文件。標籤須標注ATRA認證編號及阿富汗授權進口商信息。僅中文或僅英文標籤及手冊不足以在阿富汗消費零售通路分銷。
